home.title: 进入 KENBA 领域
home.subtitle: 暗黑幻想风 Web3 中枢：任务、奖励与链上身份，为沉浸与长线运营而生。

auth.title: 登录 KENBA
auth.subtitle: 连接钱包，或通过 Google / X 一键授权登录。
auth.emailHint: 跳转至 Google 授权，使用您的 Gmail / Google 账号登录（无需验证码）。
auth.emailNotConfigured: 邮箱登录未配置，请在服务端设置 GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
auth.twitterHint: 跳转至 X 完成授权登录。
auth.twitterNotConfigured: X 登录未配置，请在服务端设置 TWITTER_CLIENT_ID

engagement.signInRequiredHint: 连接钱包或通过 Google / X 登录后即可领取奖励并同步进度。
engagement.shopSubtitle: 使用积分兑换虚拟道具与模拟 NFT。
engagement.rewardsSubtitle: 每日签到、完成任务，收集可导出的虚拟资产。
engagement.tasksSubtitle: 完成每日、社交与活动任务，获取积分与模拟 NFT。
engagement.leaderboardSubtitle: 前 100 名玩家 — 榜单定期更新。
engagement.eventsSubtitle: 空壳王觉醒与黑纱迷雾事件——限时加成。

lore.title: KENBA 死灵都城
lore.subtitle: 将亡不死文明——派系、诅咒之地与终末寂静预言。
lore.timelineSubtitle: 从初誓破碎到终末寂静预言。
lore.creaturesSubtitle: 守卫魂税的幽影、骨利维坦与雾中孽种。

meta.title: KENBA — Enter the Dark Fantasy Web3 Realm
meta.description: A cinematic Web3 game hub: sign in daily, complete quests, collect mock NFTs, and climb the leaderboard.

hero.title: KENBA
hero.subtitle: 由禁术灵魂经济学驱动的将亡不死文明——缴纳魂税，束缚见证之魂，夺取诅咒遗物。

lore.title: The shrouded continent of KENBA
lore.body: Three factions war beneath a blood moon. Your wallet is your sigil; your streak is your oath.

0.title: The Fracture
0.body: An ancient rift spilled void energy across the realm.

1.title: Relic Hunt
1.body: Mock NFT relics record deeds for future on-chain claims.

2.title: Seasonal Siege
2.body: Limited events multiply rewards for all sworn players.

factions.title: 向将亡王座宣誓
factions.subtitle: 三股势力分割文明的尸体。钱包即印记，签到即誓言。

necropolis.name: 死灵都城邦
necropolis.desc: 在大理石城塞征收灵魂碎片的巫妖帝国。

choir.name: 空壳王庭圣歌团
choir.desc: 瓦解生者的圣歌——莫尔文的寂静王冠。

blackveil.name: 黑纱盟约
blackveil.desc: 穿越迷雾走私诅咒遗物的沼泽契约者。

token.title: Token economy (preview)
token.body: Points and relics are virtual today — exportable for future airdrops. No real contracts in this phase.

earn.title: Earn
earn.body: Sign in, tasks, events, and referrals.

spend.title: Spend
spend.body: Redeem the shop for cosmetics and mock NFTs.

airdrop.title: Airdrop-ready
airdrop.body: Admin exports back future on-chain distribution.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.body: Points, mock NFTs, and leaderboard glory.

events.title: Seasonal events
events.body: Join featured events for bonus multipliers and exclusive mock drops.

p2.body: Events, shop, leaderboards, NFT mock rewards.

p4.body: Real contracts, minting, and token launch.

q1.a: Not yet. All rewards are virtual and exportable for future airdrops.

q2.a: Daily sign-in, tasks, events, referrals, and shop refunds (admin).

q3.a: Off-chain collectible records with rarity — no blockchain minting in this phase.

q4.a: Yes. Share your invite code on the Invite page for bonus points.

footer.tagline: Dark fantasy Web3 hub — built for immersion and long-term play.
footer.legal: © KENBA. Mock experience — not financial advice.

referral.title: Invite allies
referral.subtitle: Share your code. Both you and your ally earn bonus points when they bind.
